{{CargoRelic
|name=Peacock Throne
|class_id=21122
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=The Peacock Throne is the seat of the emperors of the Mughal Empire. It features two peacock-shaped decorations at the back of the throne inlaid with various precious gems. As a symbol of power, it witnessed the rise and fall of the Mughal Empire.
|fame=43
|art=75
|fth=36
|civ=44
|tech=45
|ss1=Snail DEF +100<br>Home Facility Resource Outputs +5%<br>Vending Machine B-tad purchases +1<br>When buying B-tads, B-tads gained +10%
|ss2=Snail DEF +100<br>Home Facility Resource Outputs +5%<br>Vending Machine B-tad purchases +1<br>When buying B-tads, B-tads gained +10%
|ss3=Snail DEF +100<br>Home Facility Resource Outputs +5%<br>Vending Machine B-tad purchases +1<br>When buying B-tads, B-tads gained +10%
|ss4=Snail DEF +100<br>Home Facility Resource Outputs +5%<br>Vending Machine B-tad purchases +1<br>When buying B-tads, B-tads gained +10%
|ss5=Snail DEF +100<br>Home Facility Resource Outputs +5%<br>Vending Machine B-tad purchases +1<br>When buying B-tads, B-tads gained +10%
|ss7=Snail DEF +100<br>Home Facility Resource Outputs +5%<br>Vending Machine B-tad purchases +1<br>When buying B-tads, B-tads gained +10%<br>Home Facility Resource Outputs +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Tadpolepond skill II.png|50px]]Place in Tadpole Pond: This Relic's ART +10
|skill2=[[File:Tadpolepond skill II.png|50px]]Place in Tadpole Pond: B-tad Output +15%
}}
